MCQ: What type of machine learning trains models on labeled data to predict or classify new data?
Choices: a: Unsupervised Learning | b: Reinforcement Learning | c: Supervised Learning | d: Self-Supervised Learning

MCQ: Which type of learning finds patterns in unlabeled data?
Choices: a: Supervised Learning | b: Semi-Supervised Learning | c: Unsupervised Learning | d: Reinforcement Learning

MCQ: What is the key feature of Self-Supervised Learning?
Choices: a: It requires extensive manual labeling | b: It generates its own labels from the data | c: It uses only labeled data | d: It is identical to supervised learning
